{{Quote|How does she expect anyone to get there, a flying leaf?|Latara|<ref name="tss" />}}
A '''flying leaf''' was a transportation device that the [[Leaf Queen]] sent to the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. In his absence, several [[Youngling/Legends|young]] Ewoks took it instead, traveling to the [[Sun King's palace]].

==Description==
{{Quote|You don't expect me to get in that thing?|Latara refuses to get in|<ref name="tss" />}}
A flying leaf was an [[Color/Legends|orange]] contraption shaped like a large [[Plant/Legends|leaf]] used by the [[Leaf Queen]], a [[Deity/Legends|deity]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].<ref name="tss" />

==History==
{{Quote|<nowiki />''[Chuckles nervously]'' A flying leaf.|Latara|<ref name="tss" />}}
[[File:TeeboMagicFlyingLeaf-TSS.png|thumb|left|280px|Teebo tries to perform magic in the flying leaf.]]
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="date">{{EwoksDate|the flying leaf|[[The Season Scepter]]}}</ref> the [[Queen/Legends|queen]] sent a flying leaf to [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] to pick up the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]], whom she needed to help her. Since Logray was unavailable, the [[Youngling/Legends|young]] Ewoks [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Latara/Legends|Latara]], [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Warrick]], and [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] took the leaf instead, despite Latara resisting to get in.<ref name="tss" />

While it transported the Ewoks to the [[Sun King's palace]], Teebo tried to use a [[Magic/Legends|magic]] potion to fix the [[Temperature/Legends|cold]] weather around them; instead, the spell sliced the flying leaf in half, causing a moment of concern for the Ewoks, although the leaf quickly mended itself. However, the evil [[Snow King]]'s [[Icehead]]s then attacked the flying leaf, causing Kintaka to fall in the [[Water/Legends|snow]]. After the Iceheads fell overboard as well, the flying leaf took the remaining three Ewoks on a twisting, spinning ride, eventually sending them over a cliff and crashing in the snow.<ref name="tss" />

==Behind the scenes==
The flying leaf was created for "[[The Season Scepter]],"<ref name="tss" /> the thirteenth episode in the [[Ewoks: Season Two|second season]] of the animated television series [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']]. The episode was written by [[Bob Carrau]] and premiered on [[November 1]], [[1986]].<ref name="Insider 27">{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}}</ref>
